name: @infinite-snowball/root
description: Private monorepo root for the Infinite Snowball web game and declarative content ecosystem.

scripts.lockfile: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs install --frozen-lockfile && vitest run tests/meta/workspace-contract.test.ts --testNamePattern "dependency snapshot and lifecycle policy"
scripts.types: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run runtime:build && tsc -p packages/protocol/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/engine/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/input/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/gameplay/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/runtime-r3f/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tests/meta/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.unit: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run protocol:build && node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run runtime:build && vitest run
scripts.build: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run protocol:build && node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run runtime:build && tsc -p tests/meta/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.typecheck: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run runtime:build && tsc -p packages/protocol/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/engine/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/input/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/gameplay/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/runtime-r3f/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tests/meta/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run protocol:build && node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run runtime:build && vitest run
scripts.test:content-policy-contract: vitest run tests/meta/workspace-contract.test.ts --testNamePattern "privacy and ignore contract|dependency snapshot and lifecycle policy"
scripts.test:license-provenance-contract: vitest run tests/meta/workspace-contract.test.ts --testNamePattern "pins every approved dependency|fails closed on dependency lifecycle"
scripts.runtime:build: node tools/quality/clean-runtime-dist.mjs && tsc -p packages/engine/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/input/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/gameplay/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/runtime-r3f/tsconfig.build.json
scripts.runtime:typecheck: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run runtime:build && tsc -p packages/engine/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/input/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/gameplay/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/runtime-r3f/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.runtime:test: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run runtime:build && vitest run tests/engine tests/input tests/gameplay tests/runtime-r3f
scripts.assets:rebuild-starter: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run protocol:build && node tools/assets/rebuild-starter.mjs && node tools/assets/budget-report.mjs && node tools/assets/render-smoke.mjs --generate && node tools/assets/handoff-report.mjs
scripts.assets:rebuild-check: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run protocol:build && node tools/assets/rebuild-check.mjs
scripts.assets:verify-hashes: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run protocol:build && node tools/assets/verify-hashes.mjs
scripts.assets:budget-report: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run protocol:build && node tools/assets/budget-report.mjs --check
scripts.assets:handoff-check: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run protocol:build && node tools/assets/handoff-report.mjs --check
scripts.assets:provenance-check: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run protocol:build && node tools/assets/provenance-check.mjs && node tools/assets/withdrawal-check.mjs
scripts.assets:music-policy-check: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run protocol:build && node tools/assets/music-check.mjs
scripts.assets:brand-originality-check: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run protocol:build && node tools/assets/brand-check.mjs
scripts.licenses:ledger-check: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run protocol:build && node tools/assets/provenance-check.mjs && node tools/assets/withdrawal-check.mjs
scripts.music:policy-check: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run protocol:build && node tools/assets/music-check.mjs
scripts.brand:originality-check: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run protocol:build && node tools/assets/brand-check.mjs
scripts.assets:headless-smoke: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run protocol:build && node tools/assets/headless-smoke.mjs && node tools/assets/render-smoke.mjs
scripts.assets:test: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run protocol:build && vitest run tests/assets
scripts.assets:check: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run assets:test && node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run assets:rebuild-check && node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run assets:verify-hashes && node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run assets:budget-report && node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run assets:handoff-check && node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run licenses:ledger-check && node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run music:policy-check && node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run local-audio:boundary-check && node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run brand:originality-check && node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run assets:headless-smoke
scripts.quality: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run protocol:build && node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs run runtime:build && tsc -p packages/protocol/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/engine/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/input/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/gameplay/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/runtime-r3f/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tests/meta/tsconfig.json --noEmit && vitest run

reviewedAllowBuilds.rationale: gltfjsx@6.5.3 resolves sharp for local GLTF authoring and image processing; this exact prebuilt native binary version is present in pnpm-lock.yaml.
@gltf-transform/cli@4.4.1 resolves sharp for local asset image processing; this exact prebuilt native binary version is present in pnpm-lock.yaml.
